headline: IREN Soars 17%; Applied Digital, TeraWulf, Core Scientific Surge in a Data Center Rebound
summary: Four battered AI infrastructure stocks are staging a violent Monday morning bounce after losing up to 43% in a single month, but the question dividing bulls and bears is whether the buying signals a real shift or just a dead-cat relief pop before the next leg down.

raw.headline: IREN Soars 17%; Applied Digital, TeraWulf, Core Scientific Surge in a Data Center Rebound

headline: American Tower (AMT) Stock Still Looks Below Fair Value Following 30% Slump
summary: American Tower stock has delivered a decline of about 30.1% over the past 5 years, yet valuation checks and intrinsic value estimates currently lean supportive. This creates a clear tension between weak long term returns and a more positive valuation read. Over the past 5 years, American Tower shares are down roughly 30.1%, which means recent investors have not been rewarded despite the company remaining a major player in towers and data centers. headline: Meta Makes Big Moves Around AI Models and Chip Production
summary: The team debates whether Meta's new AI, semiconductor manufacturing, and prediction market initiatives are value-added ideas or wasted capital for the tech juggernaut.
